assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable is a recognized monetary item whose foreign exchange gains or losses are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognized foreign-currency receivable can be designated in a fair value hedge of the foreign exchange risk if it qualifies under the intragroup monetary item exception.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 also provides a cash flow hedge model for foreign currency risk associated with recognized assets or liabilities when the variability affects profit or loss.
